name: Collins Foods Limited
analysis: CKF's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 32% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.6× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$8.5800, stop A$7.9893, target A$10.2550 (2.84:1) — then trail it.
